reviews.comment:
Gasolina con atención normal y precios mas caros que Capital Federal como siempre. Nada nuevo.

(Translated by Google)
Gas stations with normal service and prices higher than in the Federal Capital, as always. Nothing new.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:

Se demora una hora como mínimo.

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Yo no la tendría en cuenta y calcularía directamente parar en la YPF de Grl. Pirán (+75km). Siempre hay mucha espera y fila para cargar.

(Translated by Google)
I wouldn't consider it and would plan to stop directly at the YPF station in General Pirán (+75km). There's always a long wait and line to fill up.
